elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)

'เซาะร่อง กว้าง 1.5 ซม ลึก 1 ซม' -- reveal groove explicitly dimensioned (1.5cm wide, 1cm deep) at upper-left, pointing to the roof-beam-level line; this is more specific than the generic 'เซาะร่อง หรือฝังเส้น PVC' callouts seen on รูปด้าน 1-3

small gable-shaped 'V' icon with step/hatch lines and an 'X'-hatched panel below it, near grid A -- alongside 'ราวกันตก R1 A-23 ดูแบบขยาย' callout, matching the equivalent feature seen on รูปด้าน 2 (หน้า10) near its grid-A end
two window openings tagged circled '2', upper floor, west-center (near gridB-gridC)

window opening tagged hexagon '5', upper floor, center (near gridC-gridD) -- matches the W5 stair-landing window from the door/window schedule (A-13), consistent with the stairwell (โถง) sitting near gridD-gridC on the floor plans
two more window openings tagged circled '2', upper floor, east-center (near gridD-gridE)
diagonally cross-hatched ('X') panel, ground floor, near grid A-B -- same open จอดรถ (carport) bay feature seen on รูปด้าน 1/2
window opening tagged circled '1', ground floor, west-center (near gridB-gridC)
twin window openings tagged hexagon '3' side by side, ground floor, center (near gridC-gridD) -- same W3 awning-type windows seen on รูปด้าน 2/3
window opening tagged circled '1', ground floor, east-center (near gridD-gridE)
Two 'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal-line notes on the right side, one at upper-floor level line, one at ground-floor level line
Several small triangle symbols each containing '1', scattered across the facade -- same recurring unidentified marker convention seen on รูปด้าน 1-3.

warnings: This elevation shows the grid letters in the order A,B,C,D,E,F left to right -- the mirror image of รูปด้าน 2 (A-08, หน้า10, which read F,E,D,C,B,A) -- i.e. these two sheets are the pair of opposite long-side elevations. Bottom dimension chain '1.80(A-B) | 3.70(B-C) | 2.20(C-D) | 3.70(D-E) | 2.00(E-F)' bracketed '13.40' matches the master grid's y_lines exactly.

GRID-RELEVANT PARTIAL MISMATCH (reporting only, master file not edited): a small '0.40' dimension is printed just to the west of (before) grid A on this sheet's bottom dimension chain -- this does NOT match the 2.05m dummy-grid ('Aprime') offset confirmed on the ground floor plan (หน้า06) and on รูปด้าน 2's own dimension chain (หน้า10). The gable/stair-like icon near grid A on THIS sheet is still present (matching รูปด้าน 2's equivalent feature), so the stair itself is presumably still there, but this particular 0.40m figure likely dimensions something else nearby (e.g. a wall-corner return or fascia edge) rather than the full ST1 stair extent -- flagged rather than force-reconciled, since only one of the two elevations showing this feature actually prints the 2.05m value explicitly.

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '4' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-10) -- cardinal direction not independently confirmed from this sheet alone, only the sheet-to-slot mapping.

Window '5' (hexagon) appearing centrally on the upper floor, directly above the ground floor's central window group, is a useful independent confirmation that the W5 stair-landing window (per the door/window schedule, expected on A-13/หน้า15) lights the same central stairwell bay identified on the floor plans.
